title: UltraRealism
description: A love letter to vanilla with a touch of hyper-realism.
body:
![Sea Lantern with Copper Block demo scene using Kappa](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bbc1a40bc29605d8afe8de8e718c188a60ea4f52_0.webp)
### UltraRealism: A love letter to vanilla with a touch of hyper-realism.
_NOTE: This page contains the 128x resolution. Higher resolutions available on [Patreon](https://patreon.com/nerdgirl_art)_

**Also available on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/ultrarealism)**

**⚠️Work in Progress:⚠️** This pack, UltraRealism, is still in the works. Most blocks are still using their vanilla textures. Further updates will be available as time goes on.

**Immersive Realism:** Experience Minecraft like never before with UltraRealism. Dive into a world where everything is meticulously crafted to bring stylized realism to your front door.

**Attention to Detail:** From Mossy Cobblestone to the Copper Block, every texture in UltraRealism is made with intricate details that enhance the beauty of Minecraft.

**Semi-Vanilla Feel:** Enjoy the immersive realism of UltraRealism while still engaging in the familiar charm of Minecraft. This texture pack maintains the essence of vanilla Minecraft, while ensuring that every adventure feels like coming home.

**Unparalleled Beauty:** Embark on heroic quests and construct impressive structures, basking in the beauty of Minecraft. With UltraRealism, every moment becomes an unforgettable experience.
